languages.text:
Detach he Joy-Con from your Nintendo Switch 2 to activate Mouse Mode.
Place the sensor faced down on a surface and slide the controller around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text:
Detach he Joy-Con from your Nintendo Switch 2 to activate Mouse Mode.
Place the sensor faced down on a surface and slide the controller around to use it like a mouse.

languages.text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.
languages.original_text: Отсоедините <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> от своего <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr>, чтобы активировать режим управления мышью. Поместите датчик мыши на поверхность и перемещайте <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> как мышь.

traits.locale_text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.
Detach the Joy-Con 2 from your Nintendo Switch 2 to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the Joy-Con 2 around to use it like a mouse.

languages.text: Отсоедините <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> от своего <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr>, чтобы активировать режим управления мышью. Поместите датчик мыши на поверхность и перемещайте <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> как мышь.
languages.original_text: Detach the Joy-Con 2 from your Nintendo Switch 2 to activate the mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor faced down on a surface and slide Joy-Con 2 around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text: Отсоедините Joy-Con 2 от своего Nintendo Switch 2, чтобы активировать режим управления мышью. Поместите датчик мыши на поверхность и перемещайте Joy-Con 2 как мышь.

languages.text: <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr>を<nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr>から取り外してマウス操作することができます。マウスセンサーを平らな面に下向きに置き、<nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr>を滑らせることでマウスのように操作してください。
languages.original_text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text: Joy-Con 2をNintendo Switch 2から取り外してマウス操作することができます。マウスセンサーを平らな面に下向きに置き、Joy-Con 2を滑らせることでマウスのように操作してください。

languages.text: Separa tu <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> de tu <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> para activar el modo ratón. Coloca el sensor del ratón boca abajo en una superficie plana y desliza el <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> para usarlo como ratón.
languages.original_text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text: Separa tu Joy-Con 2 de tu Nintendo Switch 2 para activar el modo ratón. Coloca el sensor del ratón boca abajo en una superficie plana y desliza el Joy-Con 2 para usarlo como ratón.

languages.text: 将 <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> 从您的 <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> 上拔下，即可激活鼠标操作。将鼠标感应器那一面朝下放置在平面上，之后滑动 <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr>，即可像使用鼠标一样进行操作。
languages.original_text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text: 将 Joy-Con 2 从您的 Nintendo Switch 2 上拔下，即可激活鼠标操作。将鼠标感应器那一面朝下放置在平面上，之后滑动 Joy-Con 2，即可像使用鼠标一样进行操作。

languages.text: Fare kontrollerini etkinleştirmek için <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr>'yi <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr>'den çıkarmalısın. Fare sensörünü düz bir yüzeye yüzüstü yerleştir ve <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr>'yi kaydırarak fare gibi kullan.
languages.original_text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text: Fare kontrollerini etkinleştirmek için Joy-Con 2'yi Nintendo Switch 2'den çıkarmalısın. Fare sensörünü düz bir yüzeye yüzüstü yerleştir ve Joy-Con 2'yi kaydırarak fare gibi kullan.

languages.text: Détachez les <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> de votre console <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> pour activer le mode souris. Placez le détecteur souris face vers le bas, sur une surface plane et déplacez votre <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> pour l'utiliser à la façon d'une souris.
languages.original_text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text: Détachez les Joy-Con 2 de votre console Nintendo Switch pour activer le mode souris. Placez le détecteur souris face vers le bas, sur une surface plane et déplacez votre Joy-Con 2 pour l'utiliser à la façon d'une souris.

languages.text: Entferne den <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> von deiner <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr>, um den Maus-Modus zu aktivieren. Lege den Maus-Sensor auf einen flachen Untergrund und bewege den <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> wie eine Maus.
languages.original_text: Detach the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> from your <nobr>Nintendo Switch 2</nobr> to activate mouse controls. Place the mouse sensor face down on a flat surface and slide the <nobr>Joy-Con 2 (R)</nobr> around to use it like a mouse.

traits.locale_text: Entferne den Joy-Con 2-Controller von deiner Nintendo Switch, um den Maus-Modus zu aktivieren. Lege den Maus-Sensor auf einen flachen Untergrund und bewege den Joy-Con 2-Controller wie eine Maus.
